description: Ionic + Angular mobile app to record and export blood glucose readings.

services.glucoseService: src/app/services/glucose.ts — manages Storage, BehaviorSubject stream, CRUD and Excel export

observations: Service uses Ionic Storage and a BehaviorSubject to expose records via records$.
Records are stored sorted by timestamp (newest first).
Each record created with crypto.randomUUID() and timestamp computed from date+time.
Export uses xlsx + file-saver to generate .xlsx file with Spanish column headers.
recommendedNextSteps: Run: npm install && npm run build then npm test to verify current setup.
Add e2e tests covering add/update/delete and export behaviors.
Consider input validation for date/time and numeric glucose values, and timezone handling for timestamps.
